introSection: Magnus Colossus is a wooden terrain roller coaster at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride opened on 27 July 2000. It closed in 2015 due to high maintenance costs.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was build on the side of the Mojón, and used the terrain to its advantage.

fullText:
Magnus Colossus is a wooden terrain roller coaster at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. The ride opened on 27 July 2000. It closed in 2015 due to high maintenance costs.

The ride was build on the side of the Mojón, and used the terrain to its advantage.
